zh.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter de Brus I於1152年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton19歲，母親Juetta de Arches15歲。他於1190年之前與Joan de Lacy在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年1月27日在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素享年59歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter de Brus I于1152年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯凱爾頓时，他的父亲Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton19岁，母亲Juetta de Arches15岁。他于1190年之前与Joan de Lacy在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年1月27日在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素享年59岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter de Brus I was born in 1152, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, was 19 and his mother, Juetta de Arches, was 15. He married Joan de Lacy before 1190, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 January 1211, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter de Brus I est né en 1152, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Juetta de Arches, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Lacy avant 1190, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1211, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter de Brus I 1152 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton 19 und seine Mutter Juetta de Arches 15. Er hat vor 1190 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Joan de Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Januar 1211 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Brus I è nato il nel 1152 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Juetta de Arches, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Lacy prima del 1190, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 gennaio 1211, nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Skelton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン
ja.Guisborough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Brus Iが1152年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Adam de Brus Lord of Skeltonは19歳，母Juetta de Archesは15歳であった。1190年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでJoan de Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年1月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで59歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Brus I(이)가 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Juetta de Arches(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1190년 이전 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Joan de Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 1월 27일 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Brus I nasceu em 1152, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Juetta de Arches, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Lacy antes 1190, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1211, em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter de Brus I родился в 1152 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Juetta de Arches, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Lacy перед 1190 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 января 1211 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter de Brus I nació en 1152, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Juetta de Arches, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joan de Lacy antes de 1190, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de enero de 1211, en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
